BEAUTIFUL UPDATED HOME IN HARBOR HILLS.  Located in a family-friendly neighborhood just minutes drive to the beach, this gorgeous 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom home has been updated throughout and is ready for entertaining or family living. As you enter this incredible property you will be impressed by the open layout with a large living/dining area open to a sun room and a completely remodeled kitchen.  New picture windows let plenty of natural light poor into this area as well as connects the large backyard with the interior. Beautiful wood-look tile ties all areas together. The new kitchen includes incredible granite counters, new shaker-style cabinets and stainless appliances. The master bedroom features two large picture windows, organized closet and completely remodeled en suite bathroom. The guest room has new flooring and windows with backyard views and utilizes the remodeled guest bathroom. The one car garage houses the laundry and is fit with a brand new garage door. Off the sun room is a 200 sqft screened-in covered lanai for incredible indoor/outdoor living. Out back is a large yard with fire pit area and plenty of grass for the family pet or a future pool. With concrete construction and a location in an X flood zone, this is a perfect property for anxious homeowner. Don’t miss out on seeing this amazing property, ready for your immediate
